title: Change Management Analyst
reasons: Validates risk, scope, and dependencies before CAB/eCAB
Maintains governance and conducts Post Implementation Reviews (PIR)

title: Incident Management Analyst
reasons: Owns end-to-end incident handling including detection, logging, prioritization, coordination, and closure
Strictly monitors and meets SLA/OLA/KPI definitions

title: ITSM Operations Analyst
reasons: Handles multiple ITIL practices within ServiceNow and HPSM
Delivers KT and transition support for client services

title: Infrastructure Services Analyst
reasons: Coordinates Windows Server troubleshooting and VMware vSphere environments
Manages SCCM patch coordination and Active Directory access provisioning
